subcommands.name: bootstrap
subcommands.description: Bootstraps a domain or a service into a domain

subcommands.name: bootout
subcommands.description: Tears down a domain or removes a service from a domain

subcommands.name: enable
subcommands.description: Enables an existing service

subcommands.name: disable
subcommands.description: Disables an existing service

subcommands.name: kickstart
subcommands.description: Forces an existing service to start

subcommands.name: attach
subcommands.description: Attach the system's debugger to a service

subcommands.name: debug
subcommands.description: Configures the next invocation of a service for debugging

options.description: Add introspection libraries to the DYLD_IMAGE_PATH

subcommands.name: kill
subcommands.description: Sends a signal to the service instance

subcommands.name: blame
subcommands.description: Prints the reason a service is running

subcommands.name: print
subcommands.description: Prints a description of a domain or service

subcommands.name: print-cache
subcommands.description: Prints information about the service cache

subcommands.name: print-disabled
subcommands.description: Prints which services are disabled

subcommands.name: plist
subcommands.description: Prints a property list embedded in a binary (targets the Info.plist by default)

subcommands.name: procinfo
subcommands.description: Prints port information about a process

subcommands.name: hostinfo
subcommands.description: Prints port information about the host

subcommands.name: resolveport
subcommands.description: Resolves a port name from a process to an endpoint in launchd

subcommands.name: limit
subcommands.description: Reads or modifies launchd's resource limits

subcommands.name: runstats
subcommands.description: Prints performance statistics for a service

subcommands.name: examine
subcommands.description: Runs the specified analysis tool against launchd in a non-re-entrant manner

subcommands.name: config
subcommands.description: Modifies persistent configuration parameters for launchd domains

args.name: param
args.description: A key for a key/value pair

args.name: value
args.description: A value for a key/value pair

subcommands.name: dumpstate
subcommands.description: Dumps launchd state to stdout

subcommands.name: dumpjpcategory
subcommands.description: Dumps the jetsam properties category for all services

subcommands.name: reboot
subcommands.description: Initiates a system reboot of the specified type

subcommands.name: load
subcommands.description: Recommended alternatives: bootstrap | enable. Bootstraps a service or directory of services

subcommands.name: unload
subcommands.description: Recommended alternatives: bootout | disable. Unloads a service or directory of services

subcommands.name: remove
subcommands.description: Unloads the specified service name

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: Lists information about services

subcommands.name: start
subcommands.description: Starts the specified service

subcommands.name: stop
subcommands.description: Stops the specified service if it is running

subcommands.name: setenv
subcommands.description: Sets the specified environment variables for all services within the domain

subcommands.name: unsetenv
subcommands.description: Unsets the specified environment variables for all services within the domain

subcommands.name: getenv
subcommands.description: Gets the value of an environment variable from within launchd

subcommands.name: bsexec
subcommands.description: Execute a program in another process' bootstrap context

subcommands.name: asuser
subcommands.description: Execute a program in the bootstrap context of a given user

subcommands.name: submit
subcommands.description: Submit a basic job from the command line

args.name: label
args.description: Unique label to assign to launchd

subcommands.name: managerpid
subcommands.description: Prints the PID of the launchd controlling the session

subcommands.name: manageruid
subcommands.description: Prints the UID of the current launchd session

subcommands.name: managername
subcommands.description: Prints the name of the current launchd session

subcommands.name: error
subcommands.description: Prints a description of an error

subcommands.name: variant
subcommands.description: Prints the launchd variant

subcommands.name: version
subcommands.description: Prints the launchd version

subcommands.name: help
subcommands.description: Prints the usage for a given subcommand
